content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Reducing Fractions". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/222/problem/C
content.inputFormat: The input will consist of a single fraction, represented as two integers, numerator and denominator, separated by a space.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the reduced fraction in the format 'numerator/denominator'.

solution.approach: Use the Euclidean algorithm to find the greatest common divisor (GCD) of the numerator and denominator, then divide both by the GCD to reduce the fraction.

code.Python3:
import math
num, den = map(int, input().split())
g = math.gcd(num, den)
print(f"{num // g}/{den // g}")
